# STARFALL

STARFALL is Chapter 8 of Before the Signal Fades, a narrative music project by SPARROW × ECHO. The site presents a 14-track concept album through the recovered MySpace-style profile of Cadence Vale, a fictional musician whose unfinished MAGIX Music Maker project was left at bar 72.

Canonical URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/starfall/
Before the Signal Fades archive: https://drsparrow11.github.io/btsf/
Complete YouTube playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQA_vPLnFZqw

## Album tracks

1. Prelude Before the Sky
2. Amber & Jade
3. The Body Kept Time
4. Shock Therapy (Shock Me Awake Remix)
5. Daily Grind (Once Again)
6. Aimless Stroll (Chaotic Pace Mix)
7. Winter Departure (Thawed Version)
8. Zero Point Seven Two
9. Lyra
10. Starfall
11. All They Heard
12. The Flood and the Wish
13. Still My Hand (Different Pen Reprised)
14. Wishes Upon Falling Stars
